---
title: "Luis Felipe Arias Giraldo, PhD"
subtitle: "Data scientist & Postdoctoral Researcher"
image: "uploads/profile_bw.jpeg"
about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: rounded
  image-alt: "Luis Felipe Arias Giraldo, PhD"
  image-title: "LFAG" 
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/Luisagi
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/luisagi
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-4861-8064
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=TQPUDH8AAAAJ&hl=es
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:lfarias.giraldo@gmail.com
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: CV
      href: uploads/cv_academic.pdf
---

## Welcome!

I’m Felipe. I am a motivated **data scientist in the field of plant protection**, challenged by the task of asking the right questions to data. I recently started a Postdoctoral Fellowship at the Valencian Institute for Agricultural Research (IVIA), where my research is currently focusing on applying the latest computational biology strategies to analyze genomic and ecological data to understand plant pathogens that threaten key crops in Spain and the Mediterrean Basin. Additionally, I am dedicated to developing reproducible workflows that can translate complex datasets into practical insights or applications for plant health.

### Research experience

-   🧬 **Bioinformatics**: High-throughput sequencing data analysis
-   🌿 **Ecological modeling**: Species distribution and climate change
-   📊 **Statistical analysis**: Machine learning and data visualization
-   💻 **Software development**: Building robust tools and pipelines

### Academic Background

🎓 **PhD in Plant Protection** (2025) — *Summa Cum Laude*\
University of Córdoba, Spain.\
Thesis: "Epidemiological and microbial ecology approaches to control Verticillium wilt of olive tree."

🎓 **MSc in Bioinformatics** (2019)\
University of Valencia, Spain.

🎓 **BSc in Biochemistry** (2017)\
University of Córdoba, Spain.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: callout-tip
## Interested in collaborating?

I'm always open to new collaboration opportunities. Feel free to contact me !
:::
